Why Kynd

*   ![Image 26: Non-toxic hair product](https://kyndhair.com/cdn/shop/files/kynd-hair-non-toxic-braiding-hair_1500x.jpg?v=1760036674)
Kynd Hair is free from toxic chemicals and harmful additives. We carefully select all our ingredients to meet highest quality and safety standards.

*   ![Image 27: Woman wearing Kynd itch-free braiding hair in Natural Black](https://kyndhair.com/cdn/shop/files/kynd-hair-itch-free-braiding-hair_1500x.jpg?v=1760036750)
In case you suffer from itching or skin irritations when using regular synthetic hair, Kynd Hair is for you.

*   ![Image 28: Green trees in park](https://kyndhair.com/cdn/shop/files/kynd-hair-plastic-free-braiding-hair_1500x.jpg?v=1760036783)
Kynd Hair is the first plant-based braiding hair in Europe. Free from plastic and animal-derived products.

*   [Non-toxic](https://kyndhair.com/pages/why-us)
*   [Itch-free](https://kyndhair.com/pages/why-us)
*   [Plastic-free](https://kyndhair.com/pages/why-us)

[**E** LEARN MORE](https://kyndhair.com/pages/why-us "Why Us")

Black-owned, Woman-led

![Image 29: Portrait of founder and CEO Cosima Richardson sitting in a chair and wearing Kynd braiding hair](https://kyndhair.com/cdn/shop/files/kynd-hair-founder-ceo-cosima-richardson.jpg?v=1760036820&width=3840)

## Our founder story

"I've embraced braids and hair extensions since I was five years old, until I began to question their environmental, health, and ethical impacts. I couldn't believe there were no alternatives, so I decided to start Kynd Hair."

COSIMA RICHARDSON, FOUNDER & CEO

[About us](https://kyndhair.com/pages/our-story)

Kynd Community
